children.heading: .—Rounding
children.label: a .—Rounding
children.text: Amounts computed under this chapter, if not a multiple of $1, shall be rounded to the next lower multiple of $1.

children.heading: .—Payment Date
children.label: b .—Payment Date
children.text: Amounts of retired pay and retainer pay due a retired member of the uniformed services shall be paid on the first day of each month beginning after the month in which the right to such pay accrues.
